languages.text: "Я знаю, вы не врете, Лорд-капитан. Вы — наше светило, вы не позволите им сделать из меня..." {n}Новый приступ боли заставляет мужчину дернуться, как от удара током, он глухо вскрикивает.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Я знаю, вы не врете, Лорд-капитан. Вы — наше светило, вы не позволите им сделать из меня..." {n}Новый приступ боли заставляет мучину дернуться, как от удара током, он глухо вскрикивает.{/n}

languages.text: "I know you're not lying, Lord Captain. You are our guiding light, you won't let them turn me into..." {n}A fresh wave of pain makes the man flinch as if he had been electrocuted. He lets out a muffled cry.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Я знаю, вы не врете, Лорд-капитан. Вы — наше светило, вы не позволите им сделать из меня..." {n}Новый приступ боли заставляет мужчину дернуться, как от удара током, он глухо вскрикивает.{/n}

"I know you are not lying, Lord Captain. You are our guiding light; you won't let them turn me into..." {n}A new wave of pain makes the man flinch as if he had been electrocuted. He lets out a muffled cry.{/n}

"I know you're not lying, Lord Captain. You are our guiding light, you won't let them turn me into..." {n}A fresh wave of pain makes the man flinch as if he had been electrocuted. He lets out a muffled cry.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich weiß, Ihr lügt nicht, Lord Captain. Ihr seid unser Leitbild. Ihr lasst nicht zu, dass ich ein ..." {n}Eine neue Welle aus Schmerz lässt den Mann zucken, als hätte er einen Stromschlag erlitten. Er stößt einen gedämpften Schrei aus.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I know you're not lying, Lord Captain. You are our guiding light, you won't let them turn me into..." {n}A fresh wave of pain makes the man flinch as if he had been electrocuted. He lets out a muffled cry.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich weiß, Ihr lügt nicht, Lord Captain. Ihr seid unser Leitbild. Ihr lasst nicht zu, dass ich ein ..." {n}Eine neue Welle aus Schmerz lässt den Mann zucken, als hätte er einen Stromschlag erlitten. Er stößt einen gedämpften Schrei aus.{/n}

languages.text: « Je sais que vous ne mentez pas, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Vous êtes notre phare dans les ténèbres, vous ne les laisserez pas me transformer en... » {n}Une nouvelle vague de douleur fait sursauter l'homme comme s'il avait reçu une décharge électrique. Il pousse un cri étouffé.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I know you're not lying, Lord Captain. You are our guiding light, you won't let them turn me into..." {n}A fresh wave of pain makes the man flinch as if he had been electrocuted. He lets out a muffled cry.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Je sais que vous ne mentez pas, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Vous êtes notre phare dans les ténèbres, vous ne les laisserez pas me transformer en... » {n}Une nouvelle vague de douleur fait sursauter l'homme comme s'il avait reçu une décharge électrique. Il pousse un cri étouffé.{/n}

languages.text: “我知道您没撒谎，舰长大人。您是指引我们的光，您不会让他们把我变成……”{n}又是一阵剧痛，让男人触了电似地抽搐了一下。他发出了一声闷哼。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I know you're not lying, Lord Captain. You are our guiding light, you won't let them turn me into..." {n}A fresh wave of pain makes the man flinch as if he had been electrocuted. He lets out a muffled cry.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我知道您没撒谎，舰长大人。您是指引我们的光，您不会让他们把我变成……”{n}又是一阵剧痛，让男人触了电似地抽搐了一下。他发出了一声闷哼。{/n}

languages.text: «Sé que no miente, Lord Capitán. Es usted nuestra luz guía, y no permitirá que me transformen en...». {n}Otra oleada de dolor sacude al hombre como si le hubieran dado un calambre. Suelta un grito ahogado.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I know you're not lying, Lord Captain. You are our guiding light, you won't let them turn me into..." {n}A fresh wave of pain makes the man flinch as if he had been electrocuted. He lets out a muffled cry.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Sé que no miente, Lord Capitán. Es usted nuestra luz guía, y no permitirá que me transformen en...». {n}Otra oleada de dolor sacude al hombre como si le hubieran dado un calambre. Suelta un grito ahogado.{/n}

languages.text: 「あなたが嘘をついていないことは知っていますよ、ロード・キャプテン。あなたは私たちの道しるべです。私をあんなふうには......」{n}新たな痛みの波が、まるで感電したかのように男をたじろがせる。彼はくぐもった叫び声を上げた。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I know you're not lying, Lord Captain. You are our guiding light, you won't let them turn me into..." {n}A fresh wave of pain makes the man flinch as if he had been electrocuted. He lets out a muffled cry.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「あなたが嘘をついていないことは知っていますよ、ロード・キャプテン。あなたは私たちの道しるべです。私をあんなふうには......」{n}新たな痛みの波が、まるで感電したかのように男をたじろがせる。彼はくぐもった叫び声を上げた。{/n}

languages.text: "Yalan söylemediğinizi biliyorum Lord Kaptan. Siz bizim yol gösterici ışığımızsınız, beni bir şeye dönüştürmelerine izin vermezsiniz..." {n}Yeni bir acı dalgası, adamı elektrik çarpmış gibi irkiltiyor. Boğuk bir çığlık atıyor.{/n}
